prompt: I want a custom visual effect for my homebrew weapon called 'Frostbite Blade'. When it hits a target, it should shoot an icy bolt from the attacker to the target, then create a frost/ice impact burst on the target. I want to test this from the browser console with a selected token and a targeted token. Can you help me build this?
assertions: Uses canvas.tokens.controlled[0] for caster token (correct console context)
Uses game.user.targets for target token (not args or workflow)
Includes null-check or validation on token references before running the effect
Uses .waitUntilFinished() to chain projectile into impact
Uses JB2A database paths (jb2a.*) not file system paths (modules/jb2a_patreon/...)
JB2A paths reference ice/cold/frost-themed effects (not fire or generic)
